title: cleanup: remove thinking aliases
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Removes deprecated `thinking` and `thinking_budget` chat request handling from Gen, SDK, and MCP request surfaces.
- Keeps standard `reasoning_effort` behavior and maps it to provider-native Claude/Gemini request shapes where needed.
- Removes docs-only compatibility hiding now that the schema no longer exposes the aliases.
- Adds parser, transform, SDK, and OpenAPI regressions.
- Net diff against current `main`: 18 files, 169 insertions, 251 deletions.

Checks:
- `rg -n "thinking_budget|\bthinking\b|reasoning_effort" gen.pollinations.ai/src packages/sdk packages/mcp shared/schemas gen.pollinations.ai/test packages/sdk/src --glob "!**/node_modules/**"`
- `npx biome check --write <changed files>`
- `npm run test --prefix gen.pollinations.ai -- test/text/requestUtils.test.ts test/text/transforms/createReasoningEffortTransform.test.ts test/text/transforms/createClaudeThinkingTransform.test.ts test/text/transforms/createGeminiThinkingTransform.test.ts test/openapi-json.test.ts` (49 tests)
- `npm run test --prefix packages/sdk -- src/client.test.ts` (13 tests)
- `npm run typecheck --prefix gen.pollinations.ai`
- `npm run typecheck --prefix packages/sdk`
- `npm run docs:validate --prefix gen.pollinations.ai`
- `node --check packages/mcp/src/services/textService.js`
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`

Note: this is an intentional clean break for deprecated non-standard aliases; callers should use `reasoning_effort`.

gist.headline: Streamlined reasoning
gist.blurb: We've tidied up our API schema by sweeping away the old thinking aliases. Just use reasoning_effort and let the models do the heavy lifting!
gist.summary: Removed the deprecated thinking and thinking_budget aliases from the Gen API, SDK, and MCP server to standardize exclusively on the reasoning_effort parameter.
gist.impact: Developers configuring model thinking behavior will now use the standard reasoning_effort field across all endpoints and SDKs.
gist.visual_concept: The Nomnom creature eating old deprecated code snippets (representing the removed aliases) while Polly the bee holds a shiny new sign or block representing the standard reasoning_effort parameter.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the round tan Nomnom creature happily eating old deprecated code snippets on paper, while the cute bee mascot wearing tiny wizard glasses holds a glowing block. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Cozy pixel art, 8-bit aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
